name: Hope

origin.summary: Same format as Fight Gone Bad: five one-minute stations, one-minute rest between rounds, clock runs continuously, scored by total reps across stations.

description: Five one-minute stations — burpees, power snatches, box jumps, thrusters, and chest-to-bar pull-ups — repeated for three rounds with a minute of rest between rounds, following the same station format as Fight Gone Bad.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
